role: RxBenefits — Learning and Talent Development Specialist

checks.label: Substance floor (RULE -1)
checks.evidence: All 5 experience entries verified bullet-by-bullet against canonical resume.json. InGenius: all 4 bullets present with full metrics (600+, 78% client conversion, 70+, 75%, 25+, 20+, 10+, positioning/delivery strategy/operations clause). ODN: all 3 bullets with $362K, 300+, focus groups. NextGen: all 4 canonical bullets verbatim. Vestas: all 4 canonical bullets verbatim including 12/23/1000+. Kronos: all 4 canonical bullets with 566%. No dropped clauses, no dropped metrics, no thinned bullets.

checks.label: Truth / no-relabel (RULE 0)
checks.evidence: Canva and Adobe InDesign confirmed canonical in content_library.md skills block (Design Tools). No Articulate/Storyline/video-editing/EJ4/ThinkZoom/Jira found anywhere. No $340K/17 launches composite. No 230+/80+/top-3-univ Kronos fabrication (canonical 'top universities' phrasing used). ODN correctly labeled as OD diagnostic consulting. All metrics trace to canonical source files. Skills section matches canonical vocabulary exactly per content_library.md.

checks.label: Bullet counts
checks.evidence: ODN: 3 bullets (within 2-3 canonical range). InGenius: exactly 4. NextGen: exactly 4. Vestas: exactly 4. Kronos: exactly 4. No bullet deleted to save space.

checks.label: Cover substance + voice
checks.evidence: Body bold count well exceeds 6 minimum: company bolds (Vestas Wind Systems, NextGen Healthcare, InGenius Prep, RxBenefits) plus metric bolds (3 global locations, 2000+ employee experiences, 20+ programs, 70+ staff, 75%, 600+ participants, 78% program enrollment rate). Org-psych close present (diagnose with data / collaborate cross-functionally / track metrics). Analytical organizer with a growth mindset line present. No relocation over-commitment. No visa mention. Salutation Dear RxBenefits Hiring Team correct. Voice is warm, authentic, and not AI-sounding.

checks.label: Header/location + Wesleyan coursework
checks.evidence: Resume header: Portland, OR (Open to Remote) appropriate for remote-eligible role. Wesleyan Relevant Coursework line present: Educational Psychology, Practicum in Education Studies, Psychological Testing, Learning and Motivation. USC coursework line also present.

checks.label: Cover canonical-skeleton adherence
checks.evidence: Opener: belief sentence with canonical 'continuous cycle of collecting insights, analyzing data, and refining solutions' preserved verbatim. Tagline line 2: Dedicated to Driving Individual and Organizational Development = correct OD/L&D approved variant. Paragraph order: Vestas > NextGen > InGenius = correct. Vestas: 'supported the HRBP team in piloting' (no role-upgrade); canonical M&A close present; approved-variant swap (DEI pilot leads) from canonical resume.json bullet 1. NextGen: canonical structure preserved with L&D keyword swap. InGenius: canonical close clause 'refine program positioning, delivery strategy, and operations' fully preserved; 'Grounded in adult learning theory' is an approved short participial opener to close clause per prompt spec; 'MS Office, Canva, and Adobe InDesign' folded as keyword reword inside canonical guides/workflows clause (all confirmed canonical tools). Org-psych close with analytical organizer with a growth mindset present. No free-written standalone new sentences.
